title: Soft-tier pending-graduations due-entry route hygiene complete
body: Claim 52ddb910 closed. Scope: pending-graduations due-entry route hygiene only. Added entry-local owner-decision packet pointers to the three live due entries (Director pure-direction-only, Owner action is not a cure, Marshal-as-cycle-discipline), left all three status: due, and updated the critical-drain plan with current strict-hard SOFT 20 evidence. Validation passed: Prettier, markdownlint, git diff --check, rg pointer check, and pnpm practice:fitness:strict-hard exit 0 with SOFT (20 soft). No owner/PDR-gated doctrine was promoted.
